understanding.goal_understanding: The goal is to reach the goal gem tile marked '+' by navigating the grid, using movement and clicks to overcome obstacles.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: The player moves horizontally (MOVE_LEFT/RIGHT), then automatically falls in the current gravity direction until landing on a solid tile, hitting a spike (lose run), or reaching the goal. CLICK removes breakable blocks at the target position, opening paths. UNDO reverts the last action. Gravity DOWN pulls towards lower y values (the top of the screen), and the goal is in that direction. Spikes ('u'/'v') cause instant failure on contact.

understanding.goal_understanding: The goal is to reach the goal gem tile marked '+' by navigating the grid, using movement and clicks to overcome obstacles.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: The player moves horizontally (MOVE_LEFT/RIGHT), then automatically falls in the current gravity direction until landing on a solid tile, hitting a spike (lose run), or reaching the goal. CLICK removes breakable blocks at the target position, opening paths. UNDO reverts the last action. Gravity DOWN pulls towards lower y values (the top of the screen), and the goal is in that direction. Spikes ('u'/'v') cause instant failure on contact.
